title: Senior Financial Analyst - Manappuram Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Manappuram Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Manappuram Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Manappuram Finance:
Manappuram Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manappuram Finance!
